mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id as userId, c.product_id as productId, c.quantity, c.selected_color as selectedColor, c.selected_storage as selectedStorage, c.insurance_type as insuranceType, c.insurance_price as insurancePrice, c.unit_price as unitPrice, c.added_at as addedAt, p.name as productName, p.price, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.stock, p.category FROM cart_items c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.added_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.user_id as userId, c.product_id as productId, c.quantity, c.selected_color as selectedColor, c.selected_storage as selectedStorage, c.insurance_type as insuranceType, c.insurance_price as insurancePrice, c.unit_price as unitPrice, c.added_at as addedAt, p.name as productName, p.price, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.stock, p.category FROM cart_items c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (user_id, product_id, quantity, selected_color, selected_storage, insurance_type, insurance_price, unit_price) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{selectedColor}, #{selectedStorage}, #{insuranceType}, #{insurancePrice}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId}
